p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 2 new p2p tests: test_repo_rollout_py_syntax, test_repo_slime_importable. CI commands discovered: ruff check (detects B023 closure bug in base commit - this is expected behavior), pytest plugin_contracts (requires sglang_router - not available in container). Full e2e tests require GPUs and external dependencies. Added tests verified: 6 p2p pass on base, 10 tests pass on gold (4 f2p + 6 p2p).

validate.notes: All 4 core validation checks pass. Docker build successful. NOP reward=0 (4 f2p tests correctly fail on buggy base). Gold reward=1 (10 tests pass on fixed code). Rubric judge returned HTTP 401 Unauthorized - requires external LLM authentication not available in this environment; this is an infrastructure limitation not a task issue.
